scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 17 artifact directory with the repository schema validator.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-17` passes decision.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, review.md, test-results.json, and feedback-digest.json.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-frost-fern.spec.js
scenarios.description: Locks helper math (applyStatusEffect, tickStatusEffects, getEffectiveSpeed, getEffectiveCadence), runtime chill application to walker + sniper, no-stack refresh merge, non-damage/no-sap contract, 3-layer slow visuals, chill-zone hover preview, sniper/control screening regression, and script-role regression.
scenarios.details: Blocked in this sandbox. `npm run test:uiux -- tests/uiux/game-frost-fern.spec.js tests/uiux/game-2026-04-17-flow.spec.js tests/uiux/game-board-scout-2026-04-17.spec.js tests/uiux/game-roster-assets.spec.js` exited with `Error: Cannot find module '@playwright/test'` because the sandbox does not permit hydrating node_modules for this worktree. Upstream (task_2) sandbox blockers also apply verbatim: `listen EPERM 127.0.0.1:3737` (Playwright web server) and macOS `bootstrap_check_in ... Permission denied (1100)` (Chromium launch). Re-run required in a Chromium-enabled environment before publish.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-2026-04-17-flow.spec.js
scenarios.description: Asserts the Frost Fern Control chip, tutorial Wave 1 'Hold the Lane' (availablePlants ["thornVine"]), Wave 2 'Now It's Too Fast' (availablePlants ["thornVine", "frostFern"]), challenge replay via placeDefender, and endless config equals { enemyPool:["briarBeetle","shardMite","glassRam"], startingWave:4, baseCadenceMs:1750, cadenceFloorMs:720, cadenceDropPerWave:120, waveDurationMs:9000 }.
scenarios.details: Blocked in this sandbox with `Error: Cannot find module '@playwright/test'`. Upstream (task_2) sandbox blockers also apply verbatim: `listen EPERM 127.0.0.1:3737` and `bootstrap_check_in ... Permission denied (1100)`. Re-run required before publish.

scenarios.name: Playwright — game-board-scout-2026-04-17.spec.js

scenarios.name: Runtime probe — replay-2026-04-17-no-control.json
scenarios.description: Runs `npm run probe:scenario-runtime -- --date 2026-04-17 --replay scripts/replay-2026-04-17-no-control.json`. Expected `outcome: gameover` — April 15 opening without a control plant cannot hold the April 17 challenge.
scenarios.details: Blocked in this sandbox. The probe entry point is not on the agent's command allowlist (only `npm run test:uiux` is permitted). Upstream (task_2) sandbox blocker for the Chromium launch required by this probe is preserved verbatim: `bootstrap_check_in ... Permission denied (1100)`. Re-run required in a Chromium-enabled environment before publish.
